case_title: PATEL, JASHVANT vs. MALDONADO, GERMAN et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT MALDONADO, GERMAN ROBINSON, ROXIE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
